title: Sinenkani triumphs over Camdeboo
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Bizana witnessed an exhilarating football match as Sinenkani FC secured a commanding 6-2 victory against Camdeboo Football Academy at the Mphuthumi Mafumbhatha Stadium on Saturday 19 January.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Bizana witnessed an exhilarating football match as Sinenkani FC secured a commanding 6-2 victory against Camdeboo Football Academy at the Mphuthumi Mafumbhatha Stadium on Saturday 19 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The match, backed by support from the Bizana community, showcased the competitive spirit of local football.","html":"The match, backed by support from the Bizana community, showcased the competitive spirit of local football."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the initial half, Sinenkani took the lead, but Siyabukea Khali levelled the score at 1-1 in the 29th minute."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The first half finished with Sinenkani ahead 2-1. Despite being well-prepared to face one of the Eastern Cape's formidable teams, Camdeboo Academy encountered intense pressure from the opposing team.","html":"The first half finished with Sinenkani ahead 2-1. Despite being well-prepared to face one of the Eastern Cape's formidable teams, Camdeboo Academy encountered intense pressure from the opposing team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second half witnessed Sinenkani maintaining their dominance, adding more goals to their tally.","html":"The second half witnessed Sinenkani maintaining their dominance, adding more goals to their tally."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lenko Karabo Mokoena netted the second goal in the 61st minute, contributing to the final score of 6-2 in favour of Sinenkani.","html":"Lenko Karabo Mokoena netted the second goal in the 61st minute, contributing to the final score of 6-2 in favour of Sinenkani."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In other Local Football League (LFA) action at uMasizakhe Stadium on Sunday, 20 January, a fiercely contested match unfolded between Dangerous Darkies and Eleven Attackers, culminating in a 2-1 victory for Attackers.","html":"In other Local Football League (LFA) action at uMasizakhe Stadium on Sunday, 20 January, a fiercely contested match unfolded between Dangerous Darkies and Eleven Attackers, culminating in a 2-1 victory for Attackers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The packed stadium attracted enthusiastic supporters and fans, turning the derby into a thrilling spectacle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stream A score results:","html":"Stream A score results:"},{"type":"list","items":["FC Galaxy 2-0 Camdeboo Football Academy","Birds United FC 5-0 Portugal Birds","Protea Spurs FC 2-0 JV Manchester United","Super
